title: Amy's Vanities: Moonstone
description: A design addon for the Vanity mod, giving your tools a stone-like appearance with a shiny blue edge.
body:
# Amy's Vanities: Moonstone
This Vanity Pack adds a cool enlargened set of appearances for your tools and weapons, applicable at **Vanity: Core's** Styling Table!
The Design can be obtained by buying it from a villager who has a job at **Vanity: Core's** Styling Table.
![The Moonstone design and all of it's sprites, each tool is either exactly or above 20x20 in size.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qZuTIYmr/images/74a187b1ce946766bc9733defe5b041ae014f02e.png)
